items.h: San Diego Mayor Honors AEW Star By Declaring July 1 'Thunder Rosa Day,' Rosa Responds

items.h: AEW's Mick Foley Announces End Of WWE Legends Deal, Says Farewell To Company
items.p: AEW's Mick Foley announced the official end of his WWE Legends deal in a video posted to Instagram on Wednesday.
